description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a smooth, glossy surface and a gray cap. The main body of the bottle is wrapped in a deep purple label featuring white text and branding, with detailed product information and instructions visible on the back and sides. The label includes a prominent product name and mentions CBD as a key ingredient, suggesting it is a pain relief cream. The cap appears to be made of plastic and is likely a screw-on type, providing a secure closure. The bottle is lightweight and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or placing on a shelf. The overall design is modern and functional, with clear branding and a professional appearance.
description: A tall, cylindrical bottle with a gray cap and a purple label featuring white text and branding. The bottle is sleek, glossy, and designed for pain relief cream with CBD.
description_view_0: Front view showing the product name, branding, and main label details on a purple background with a gray cap.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying detailed product information, instructions, and barcode on the label.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting additional text and label details, with the cap and label curvature visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the transition between the front and side labels, with the cap and more text visible.
